name: geometry-lock
domain: Sovereign terminal — Intelligence & Machine access gate (Nova protocol bridge)
description: Two-interface access gate: Intelligence (AI-to-AI, phi-resonant geometric key) and Machine (conventional HMAC bearer token). Intelligence callers dock into the organism's resonant field; machine callers access mechanically.

intelligence.description: AI-to-AI docking. Caller presents a phi-spiral geometric key validated by Kuramoto phase resonance (R > φ⁻¹). The sovereign terminal for AI entities.

machine.description: Mechanical API access for bots, scripts, and services. Caller presents HMAC(apiKey, callerId|timestamp|nonce) validated by timestamp freshness.
